scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ai-story/shared build && pnpm --filter @ai-story/templates build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:continuous-strategy
scripts.test:core: node --import tsx src/auth/auth-return-to.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/auth-session-options.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/auth.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/email/email.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/email/templates/transactional-email.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/auth.guard.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/auth-business-boundary.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/google-token-verifier.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/google-auth.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/billing/billing.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/billing/billing-readiness.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/billing/billing-admin.guard.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/billing/refund-workflow.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/billing/creem-webhook.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/result-sharing/result-sharing.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/story.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/story-create-rollback.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/story.http.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/mvp-catalog.spec.ts
scripts.test:continuous-strategy: node --import tsx src/auth/admin.guard.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/legacy-story-access.guard.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/auth/legacy-story-deny-matrix.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/config/continuous-strategy.config.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-strategy/content.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-strategy/action-window.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-strategy/action-command.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-strategy/window-resolution.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-strategy/transport-projection.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-strategy/runtime-genericity.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-story-v2/story-context.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-story-v2/story-generation.pipeline.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-story-v2/story-content.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/continuous-story-v2/guard-error-contract.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/role-agent-provider-url.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/story-access/story-access.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/story-task-outbox.service.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/rooms.presentation.spec.ts && node --import tsx src/worlds.controller.spec.ts
